title: dysoxylum pumilum
intro: Dysoxylum pumilum, also known as the Philippine Dysoxylum or Small-leafed Dysoxylum, is a species of evergreen tree in the family Meliaceae. The medicinal properties of Dysoxylum pumilum lie in its bark, which contains flavonoids and tannins that have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to reduce fever, relieve pain, and prevent infections. Dysoxylum pumilum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea, infusion, and tincture, which can be used to treat different ailments.
